engineering.translation: This shloka names the destination of buddhi-yoga and the claim is metaphysical: those joined to buddhi, abandoning the fruit born of action, become freed from janma-bandha — the bondage of birth-and-rebirth — and reach padam anāmayam, the state beyond affliction. The engineering layer must stay scope-honest. Krishna is not promising fewer bad rollouts; he is naming saṁsāric release. STRETCHED in scope. The operational reflection that does carry over: a specific kind of friction dissolves for the engineer who has actually internalised buddhi-yoga — the grasping at every promo cycle, the self-image rebuilt with each launch tweet, the treatment of each dashboard reading as a verdict on whether one matters. Anāmayam in the analog is not 'no more incidents'; it is the absence of the specific affliction generated by self-stake-coupling to outcomes. The senior who has shed that grasping is freed from a small, named friction — a valid reflection of a much larger metaphysical claim, not the claim itself.
engineering.concrete_scenario: Two senior engineers six years into their careers. Engineer A's calendar reads through the recent year as a string of promotion-cycle anchors: each significant project chosen for its visibility to the staff-level review, each design doc shaped to read well to the committee, each launch celebrated or mourned in proportion to its packet-impact. Her work is genuinely competent — artifacts ship, systems run — but the substrate she works from is captured. Each cycle she is rebuilt by the result. Engineer B at the same tenure has done equally hard projects. The difference does not show on the org chart; it shows across her week. After a clean Postgres migration she does not refresh the Slack channel for praise. After a Sentry-flagged regression traced back to her change, she does not spend two days reconstructing her self-image; she opens the postmortem template, files the diff, walks the SRE through the rollback, returns to the next merge. The promotion eventually arrives because the engineering is good; the promotion does not move her substrate, because her substrate is no longer downstream of it. The verse's literal claim is metaphysical and we are not making it. The operational reflection: Engineer B is freed from a grasping-friction that Engineer A is still inside, and the difference shows in how each runs the same week.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'padam anāmayam' as a promise of fewer incidents, smoother launches, easier roadmaps, or stable team morale. The verse does not promise any of these. It names a metaphysical state and we are tagging the operational reflection as STRETCHED. An engineer who concludes from this analog that buddhi-yoga will reduce on-call pages or improve sprint outcomes has confused the small operational reflection with the large metaphysical claim. The diagnostic: across two promo cycles, does the engineer's substrate (decision-making, judgment quality, willingness to hold unpopular technical positions) move with the committee's last reaction? If yes, the friction the verse names is still active.
engineering.counter_example: When the operator faces real distress — a failed product built over two years, a layoff, a vendor outage that hurts users — the verse does not require the engineer to feel nothing. Anāmayam is not affective flatness. It names the absence of self-stake-coupling-to-outcomes, not the absence of feeling. An engineer who reads the analog as license for emotional suppression has misread it as badly as one who reads it as a promise of incident-free quarters.
engineering.implication: The friction this verse names — grasping at every cycle's verdict on one's worth — is optional to act from, not optional to feel. The diagnostic lives in the substrate, not the affect. Notice whether your next decision is shaped by what the system needs or your packet needs.
engineering.quotable_line: The promotion eventually arrives because the engineering is good; the promotion does not move her substrate, because her substrate is no longer downstream of the promotion.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: source pack triangulated across vedabase.io (Prabhupada) + holy-bhagavad-gita.org (Mukundananda) + gitasupersite.iitk.ac.in (Devanagari) + bhagavad-gita.us (Shankara excerpt; Ramanuja null on this verse — flagged in source pack) + GRETIL critical edition (Bhg_02.051). CRITICAL CARE per task spec: 'janma-bandha' and 'padam anāmayam' are metaphysical — engineering analog must NOT claim metaphysical liberation. Engineering layer opens with explicit scope-tagging ('STRETCHED in scope') and stays at the operational layer (release from a specific kind of grasping-friction). Confidence=MEDIUM, stretched=true. Concrete scenario contrasts Engineer A (substrate captured by promo cycle) vs Engineer B (substrate not downstream of promo cycle) — both equally competent, the difference is in what they are working FROM. Named tools: Postgres, Slack, Sentry. Falsifiability handles the misreading 'fewer incidents'. Counter-example handles the affective-flatness misreading. Tags: fruits-of-action, outcome-detachment, non-attachment-to-praise, judgment-under-uncertainty.

Single mutation: trim translation+scenario+implication to clear three concurrent gates (5.1 cap 180, 5.5 lexical diversity, 11.1 total cap 600). Specifically: removed redundant 'six years into careers / same tenure' phrasings, dropped duplicated 'engineering / engineer' anchors, replaced 'a vendor outage that actually hurts users' → 'a vendor outage that hurts users'. Two iterations needed because total-word count is summed across literal_meaning + traditional_meaning_consensus + engineering fields; final tightening was on the implication field. Engineering substance untouched.
